16.code: void cmp(const void* p, const void* q)
16.reason: [The comparison function for qsort must return int, not void. This causes undefined behavior during sorting.]

34.reason: [Incorrect scanf format: expects coefficient then exponent, but format string reads coeff, char, exponent, char. Should be "%d %d%c" or similar to match input "a_n n ...". This misreads input and causes wrong parsing.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Incorrect scanf format: expects coefficient then exponent, but format string reads coeff, char, exponent, char. Should be "%d %d%c" or similar to match input "a_n n ...". This misreads input and causes wrong parsing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Incorrect scanf format: should read coefficient then exponent, but format "%d%c%d%c" expects coeff, char, exponent, char. Input format is "coeff exp", so it should be "%d %d%c" or similar to capture newline correctly. This leads to misreading input.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.2 , reason:  [Incorrect input format: the problem specifies coefficient then exponent (e.g., "a_n n"), but this reads as "coefficient char exponent char", which mismatches the actual space-separated input. It should be "%d %d%c" like in the reference.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.2 , reason:  [Incorrect input parsing: expects coefficient, then char, then exponent, then char. But input format is "coef exp coef exp ...", so it should be "%d %d%c" like reference. This misreads input and causes wrong parsing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.2 , reason:  [Incorrect input format: the problem specifies coefficient then exponent (e.g., "a_n n"), but this reads as "coefficient char exponent char", which mismatches the actual input format. It should be "%d %d%c" like in the reference.]

59.reason: [Passing a function returning void as comparison function to qsort is invalid. This is undefined behavior and likely causes crash or incorrect sort.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.2 , reason:  [Passing a function returning void as comparison function to qsort is invalid. This is undefined behavior and likely causes crash or incorrect sort.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.2 , reason:  [Passing a void-returning function 'cmp' to qsort which expects int-returning comparator. This is undefined behavior and likely causes crash or incorrect sort.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.2 , reason:  [Because cmp is declared as returning void instead of int, this invokes undefined behavior and likely causes a crash or incorrect sort.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.2 , reason:  [Passing a void-returning function to qsort leads to undefined behavior; compiler may not catch it but runtime will be incorrect.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.2 , reason:  [Passing a void-returning function as comparator to qsort is invalid; qsort expects int (*)(const void*, const void*). This is a critical error.]

63.reason: [When i=0, accesses ans[-1], which is out-of-bounds memory access 鈫 undefined behavior.]
